title: BEM-799 processor marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:25 (UTC+3)'
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
txt=proc.read_text(errors='ignore') if proc.exists() else ''
marker='governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json'
if marker not in txt:
    inject='mkdir -p governance/state\nprintf \'{"status":"processor_started","time":"%s"}\\n\' "$now" > governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json\n'
    txt=txt.replace('count=0\n', 'count=0\n'+inject, 1)
    proc.write_text(txt)
commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore') if commit.exists() else ''
if marker not in ct:
    ct=ct.replace('git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results || true', 'git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json || true')
    commit.write_text(ct)
state={'bem':'BEM-799','status':'processor_marker_installed','marker':marker,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem799_add_queue_processor_execution_marker.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem799_add_queue_processor_execution_marker.md').write_text('# BEM-799 | Add Queue Processor Execution Marker | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem799_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify processor marker/results.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-799'+sep+sep+'Next: run tick and verify processor marker/results.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(proc),str(commit),'governance/state/bem799_add_queue_processor_execution_marker.json','governance/reports/bem799_add_queue_processor_execution_marker.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem799_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Added execution marker to workflow dispatch queue processor and included marker in commit script')
"""
No issue comments.
